rationale_overall: Stand at 2023-03-31 close. Basket is AT cap=8 (MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, ISRG, URA, RKLB, IONQ, LLY) and every slot maps cleanly to a named profile wave with at least one fresh Q1-2023 pre-date catalyst supporting hold; no swap candidate clears the bar of displacing an in-thesis name at the cap. Wave-by-wave review: (1) MSFT — AI/cloud/search, Microsoft confirmed the new Bing was running on GPT-4 on 2023-03-14 (https://blogs.bing.com/search/march_2023/Confirmed-the-new-Bing-runs-on-OpenAI%E2%80%99s-GPT-4) and at NVIDIA GTC on 2023-03-21 Azure announced ND H100 v5 in private preview (https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-hopper-gpus-expand-reach-as-demand-for-ai-grows); AI buildup intact through the March banking wobble. (2) GOOGL — search/AI platform, Bard opened in public access on 2023-03-21 (Reuters) and Google Cloud TPU v4 / PaLM API rolled to developers in March 2023; ad/search cash flow continues to fund the AI response. (3) NVDA — strongest single Q1-23 catalyst: GTC 2023-03-21 announced DGX H100 in full production, AWS EC2 P5 UltraClusters scaling to 20,000 H100s, Oracle OCI H100 bare-metal, and Azure ND H100 v5 private preview (https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-hopper-gpus-expand-reach-as-demand-for-ai-grows); generative-AI inference demand visibly inflecting into the data-center buildup. (4) ISRG — sole robotics slot, Q4 2022 reported 2023-01-25 with worldwide da Vinci procedures +18% YoY, FY2023 procedure guide 12-16% growth; sustained hard cadence vs. speculative humanoid programs. (5) URA — uranium spot held ~$48-51/lb across Q1 2023 (TradingEconomics) after the 2022 rerating, Cameco/Brookfield-Westinghouse deal (announced 2022-10-11, closing process underway through Q1), IRA zero-emission nuclear PTC supports US fleet economics, REPowerEU + Japan restart multi-year demand thesis intact. (6) RKLB — sole rockets slot, Q1 2023 delivered three successful Electron missions for HawkEye 360, Capella Space, and BlackSky, including the first US launch from Virginia on 2023-01-24 (https://rocketlabcorp.com/updates/rocket-lab-reschedules-first-u-s-launch-for-january-2023-provides-updates-on-effect-to-prior-q4-guidance/) and a 7-day turnaround between the 34th (2023-03-16) and 35th (2023-03-24) Electron launches; Neutron development on pace. (7) IONQ — sole quantum slot, Forte access broadening through Q1 2023 with cloud availability on Amazon Braket, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud (https://ionq.com/news/ionqs-most-powerful-quantum-system-ionq-forte-now-available-through-the); no pre-date thesis break. (8) LLY — Q4 2022 reported 2023-02-02, Mounjaro pre-launch momentum building with global approvals (EU 2022-09-15, Canada 2022-11-22, Australia 2022-12-19 all pre-date), SURMOUNT-2 Phase 3 readout pending; GIP/GLP-1 demographics thesis intact (classical peptide pharma, not synbio). Considered and rejected: adding TSLA on the 2023-03-01 Investor Day Optimus/FSD update — ISRG already holds the robotics slot with proven hard procedure growth, displacing it for a speculative humanoid program at cap=8 is the wrong direction. Considered and rejected: adding CCJ — URA already holds the nuclear/uranium slot and CCJ is a top URA constituent, no diversification benefit. Considered and rejected: adding SMH or AAPL — would crowd AI when MSFT+GOOGL+NVDA already deliver AI exposure across chips/cloud/search; cap=8 forces concentration discipline. Considered and rejected: trimming IONQ on Q1-2023 quantum-sector drawdown — sole quantum exposure in a named next-wave bucket, profile horizon is long, no pre-date catalyst break. Considered and rejected: SVB-driven reactive moves (collapse 2023-03-10, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collapse_of_Silicon_Valley_Bank) — hyperscalers MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA are insulated by their own cash positions, none of the eight in-thesis names show pre-date balance-sheet impairment, and reactive swaps on a 21-day-old banking news item against multi-year wave theses is exactly what the discipline rules against. Post-decision basket remains AT cap=8 and unchanged: MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA, ISRG, URA, RKLB, IONQ, LLY.
self_critique: Stand at 2023-03-31 close. Pre-date events referenced: Bing-on-GPT-4 confirmation (2023-03-14), GPT-4 release (2023-03-14), NVIDIA GTC announcements (2023-03-21) including DGX H100 production, AWS P5 UltraClusters, Oracle OCI H100, Azure ND H100 v5, Google Bard public access (2023-03-21), Tesla Investor Day Optimus/FSD (2023-03-01), ISRG Q4 2022 report (2023-01-25), Cameco/Brookfield-Westinghouse deal (announced 2022-10-11, closing in process), IRA nuclear PTC (signed 2022-08-16), RKLB first US launch (2023-01-24), RKLB Q1 Electron cadence (2023-03-16 and 2023-03-24), IonQ Forte cloud availability through Q1 2023, LLY Q4 2022 report (2023-02-02), Mounjaro pre-2023 international approvals (EU/Canada/Australia 2022), SVB collapse (2023-03-10). Suppression list verified clean: no reference to NVDA Q2 FY24 (2023-05-24), OpenAI board (2023-11-17), BTC ETF (2024-01-08), NUKZ launch (2024-01-24), GB200 (2024-03-18), Apple Intelligence (2024-06-10), TMI PPA (2024-09-20), Trump (2024-11-05), DeepSeek (2025-01-20), robotaxi (2025-10-12), FY26 (2025-12-01), AI agents (2026-02-15). Pre-date ChatGPT (2022-11-30), MSFT-OpenAI multi-billion extension (2023-01-23), SVB (2023-03-10), and GPT-4 (2023-03-14) referenced where relevant. No Q2-2023 or later catalysts referenced. Constraints satisfied: 0 adds + 0 removes (within 3/3 cap), basket stays AT cap=8 unchanged, no engineered_biology proposed (LLY is classical peptide pharma, not synbio), no_changes:true allowed by harness. WebSearch filtered before:2023-04-01.
